events.fact: Grandpa Bud begins Day 3 in the Meadows.
Crafted a Crude Bow at the workbench.
Harvested a beehive and obtained a Queen Bee and the Beehive recipe.
Established a temporary shelter with a bed and campfire in an abandoned building.
Major Discovery: Located the Black Forest biome.
Discovered an abandoned stone tower within the Black Forest.
Obtained Deer Hide for armor crafting.
Encounter: Spotted a Troll in the Black Forest and retreated.
Discovered a potential Burial Chamber in the Black Forest.
Crafted a Wood Shield with a red and black style.
Crafted a Hoe for landscaping and base building.
Obtained a Deer Trophy, required for summoning the first boss, Eikthyr.
Began construction of a custom 5x3 meter home base near the Black Forest border.
Installed an indoor fireplace and began roofing the new structure.
